bp12.title: New Wayfinding System for BP12 Jelapang
bp12.description: A concept proposal I made to showcase my replication works capability. Design is updated in July 2024, to align with current design standards.

bus-rep.title: Bus Replications
bus-rep.description: These replications all started with me waiting for my bus, and me getting fascinated with the different looks and colour of the buses. Hence, I decided "Hey, let's try and replicate a Bus Model." (The A&S Double Decker Bus is a commissioned work.)

buszy.title: Buszy - Bus Arrival Timings
buszy.description: A passion project. Started off from vibe-coding, it has slowly transformed into a fully functional Bus Arrival Web App.

delays-checker.title: RailBuddy - Stay on track, always
delays-checker.description: A pet-project of mine. Created to keep track of rail delays. The new version includes real-time updates, improved user interface, and the inclusion of First/Last Train Timings.

ezlink-red.title: EZ-Link Card Redesign
ezlink-red.description: An attempt to redesign the EZ-Link Concession Cards, based on the current design language of the wayfinding system.

ffl.title: Friends Forever Logo Design
ffl.description: A submission for a logo competition based on the theme "Friends Forever", conducted by ITE College West's School of Electronics and Infocomm Technology.

food-rev-flash-app.title: Food Review Compiler/Flashify - a Flashcard App
food-rev-flash-app.description:
Food Review Compiler App - A Food Review Compiler App Mockup that compiles all the reviews and suggestions by the community, and arranges them by ratings.
Flashify - A Flashcard App Mockup with gaming features to make learning fun and exciting.

hydrationreg.title: Hydration Regime Infographic
hydrationreg.description: A remake of SAF's Hydration Regime Infographic.

igra1.title: Infographic Resume
igra1.description: A submission for an assignment to turn my Resume into an Infographic Version.

igra2.title: COVID-19 Shopping Habits Infographic
igra2.description: A submission for an assignment to produce an actual Infographic, based on a given topic.

igra3.title: How To Use TimeTree Infographic
igra3.description: TimeTree is a shared calendar app that makes it very easy to share and coordinate schedules. Great to monitor unavailability of NSFs/Regulars. Details have been redacted for privacy reasons.

improve-wf.title: Experimenting Improvements of Current Wayfinding
improve-wf.description: A microsite page in my Personal Website where I explored different ways and ideas to make the current Wayfinding system better. These includes the changes and improvements, as well as some original ideas of my own. First conceptualized as a Handbook.

lta-bp.title: LTA Bus Stop Pole Design Refresh
lta-bp.description: A metal pole erected beside the bus stop, which shows the bus routes that call at the particular stop. Last modernized back in 2009, I believe the iconographies and colours are due for a refresh - in line with the new wayfinding system introduced in 2019.

lta-pids.title: LTA Bus PIDS Redesign
lta-pids.description: My take on the redesign of LTA's Bus Passenger Information Display System (PIDS).

man-a22-masc.title: MAN A22 Lion Mascot Replication
man-a22-masc.description: This legendary mascot used to be everywhere in the early 2010s. The mascot was used in promoting SMRT's newest bus model, back then, the MAN A22.

more-rep.title: More Replications
more-rep.description: Aside from Buses only, I attempted to replicate Trains, Cars and Lorries too. The classic bus was an experimental work, because hey, I wasn't born yet, so I didn't know how the buses actually looked like exactly.

mrt-signage-rep-s1.title: MRT Signages Concept/Replications S1
mrt-signage-rep-s1.description: An attempt to replicate the new signage designs, as well as to update older signages to the new wayfinding system.

mrt-signage-rep-s2.title: MRT Signages Concept/Replications S2
mrt-signage-rep-s2.description: Ever taken the brown line (heh, poop colour)? Some of these may look familiar to you. But I've injected some of my improvements in the designs in here. The first picture - The Yew Tee Train Timings, were made way back in 2021. But the real-life counterpart is shockingly similiar.

myts-app.title: MyTransport.SG App Redesign
myts-app.description: An app concept of the redesigned MyTransport.SG App, updated with the current design language from the new wayfinding system.

sit.title: Store Inventory Tracking
sit.description: 3 out of my many ideas and prototypes on how to enhance store/inventory tracking operations. (Details redacted for privacy)
